summary:
Detailed implementation plan for Phase 3 (Pricing, Quote & Booking) of the CirclCare AI app. Covers:
- Backend: pricingEngine.ts (formula with 7 line-item types), quoteRoutes wiring, bookingSimulator.ts (in-memory lifecycle), bookingRoutes wiring
- Frontend: Full QuoteScreen with animated sequential reveal, useQuote/useQuoteStore hooks, full ConfirmScreen with success animation and family-notified badge, useBooking/useBookingStore hooks
- Data flow diagram showing end-to-end Phase 3 sequence
- Verification plan for both backend endpoints and frontend navigation flow
